description: Multi-department Digital AI Employee Platform — MVP progress registry. Read this file FIRST when resuming work on any phase.
how_to_resume: 1. Read this file to find the current phase (first phase where status != 'complete'). 2. Read the phase's resume_hint for what to do next. 3. Run the phase's verification_commands to assess actual state — checkpoints may be stale if work happened outside a tracked session. 4. After completing work, update this file: set checkpoint statuses, update phase status, set last_updated and last_session_id.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: TypeScript project scaffold, Prisma schema (16 tables), local Supabase, migrations, seed data, Vitest test suite.

schema_defined.description: prisma/schema.prisma with 7 MVP + 9 forward-compat tables, all FKs, nullable FK strategy

migrations_applied.description: 3 migrations: init (16 tables + FKs + UNIQUE), CHECK constraints (raw SQL), schema sync
migrations_applied.notes: Database is 'ai_employee' on local Supabase (not default 'postgres'). See AGENTS.md for per-project DB convention.

constraints_enforced.description: CHECK on tasks.status (13 values), CHECK on task_status_log.actor (5 values), UNIQUE on tasks(external_id, source_system, tenant_id)
constraints_enforced.verify_command: psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:54322/ai_employee -c "INSERT INTO tasks (id, status, tenant_id, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'INVALID', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', now());" 2>&1 | grep -q 'violates check constraint' && echo 'PASS' || echo 'FAIL'

seed_data.description: 1 project (test-project, UUID ...0003), 1 agent_version (claude-sonnet-4, UUID ...0002). Idempotent upserts.

tests_written.description: 12 Vitest tests in tests/schema.test.ts: table existence, CHECK constraints, UNIQUE constraints, seed data, default values

tests_passing.description: All 12 tests pass against live ai_employee database

committed.description: All Phase 1 code committed to main branch

phases.resume_hint: Phase 1 is complete. Proceed to Phase 2.

phases.name: Event Gateway
phases.description: Fastify server accepts webhooks, validates signatures, parses payloads with Zod, writes task records to Supabase with idempotency and project filtering.

fastify_server.description: Fastify app with /health, /webhooks/jira, /webhooks/github routes in src/gateway/

signature_verification.description: Jira HMAC and GitHub X-Hub-Signature-256 verification. Invalid signature → 401.

payload_validation.description: Zod schemas for Jira and GitHub payloads. Invalid payload → 400.

webhook_routing.description: jira:issue_created → task record (Ready), jira:issue_deleted → Cancelled, unknown → ignore

project_filtering.description: Match issue.fields.project.key against projects table. Unknown project → 200, no task.

task_creation.description: Write tasks row with status Ready, populate triage_result with raw webhook, store raw_event. UNIQUE handles duplicates.

status_logging.description: task_status_log entry on every transition (actor: gateway)

test_fixtures.description: test-payloads/ directory with jira-issue-created.json, jira-issue-created-invalid.json, jira-issue-created-unknown-project.json

phases.resume_hint: Phase 2 is complete. Proceed to Phase 3 (Inngest Core).

phases.name: Inngest Core
phases.description: Events flow from Gateway to Inngest Dev Server, engineering lifecycle function triggers and manages status transitions with optimistic locking.

inngest_client.description: Inngest client, serve endpoint (/api/inngest with 2 registered functions), and send function with retry logic all implemented in Phase 2 and verified in Phase 3.

lifecycle_function.description: engineering/task-lifecycle function with concurrency (3/project), optimistic locking Ready→Executing, cancellation check, placeholder dispatch, waitForEvent 4h10m, finalize with re-dispatch/escalation.

optimistic_locking.description: All status transitions use prisma.task.updateMany with WHERE id = taskId AND status = expectedStatus. Lock failure throws NonRetriableError to prevent Inngest retries.

redispatch_handler.description: engineering/task-redispatch function skeleton that emits engineering/task.received via step.sendEvent() to trigger a new lifecycle instance. Phase 5 will add elapsed time check.

inngest_send_failure.description: Implemented in Phase 2 (jira.ts lines 97-115). If inngest.send() fails after 3 retries → 202 response, task stays in DB with raw_event for manual recovery. Verified in Phase 3.

tests_written.description: 11 lifecycle unit tests (tests/inngest/lifecycle.test.ts), 3 redispatch unit tests (tests/inngest/redispatch.test.ts), 4 registration tests added to inngest-serve.test.ts, 4 integration tests (tests/inngest/integration.test.ts, skip when no INNGEST_DEV_URL). Total Phase 3 tests: 22.

tests_passing.description: 107 tests pass + 4 integration tests skipped (total 111). 0 failures. TypeScript build clean (0 errors).

committed.description: All Phase 3 code committed: lifecycle.ts, redispatch.ts, serve.ts update, all test files, @inngest/test dependency.

phases.resume_hint: Phase 3 is complete. Proceed to Phase 4 (Execution Infrastructure).

phases.name: Execution Infrastructure
phases.description: callLLM() wrapper calls OpenRouter with retry/cost tracking, thin API wrappers (Jira/GitHub/Slack) with retry-on-429, multi-stage Docker image with all tooling, idempotent entrypoint.sh boot script, container boots and writes heartbeat to Supabase.

llm_gateway.description: callLLM({model, messages, taskType}) with OpenRouter, retry-on-429, AbortController timeout, cost circuit breaker with 5min cache, cost calculation from token counts

api_wrappers.description: jiraClient (Basic auth, 3 methods), githubClient (Bearer, handles 403+rate-limit), slackClient (ok:false pattern) — all with retry-on-429 via withRetry()

docker_image.description: Multi-stage Dockerfile: node:20-slim + git + gh@2.45.0 + opencode-ai@1.3.3 + fuse-overlayfs. Image size 1.42GB. TARGETARCH for arm64/amd64 portability.

entrypoint_script.description: entrypoint.sh: 8-step idempotent boot (auth, clone --depth=2, branch, pnpm install, docker daemon optional, task context from Supabase, heartbeat write, handoff to orchestrate.mjs)

container_boots.description: Container boots against local Supabase, reads task context, writes heartbeat to executions table, reaches Step 8 handoff point cleanly
container_boots.notes: Uses antfu/ni as test repo (pnpm-native). PostgREST serves 'postgres' DB not 'ai_employee' — script creates tables there for testing.

tests_written.description: 83 new tests: build.test.ts (9), retry.test.ts (8), errors.test.ts (9), call-llm.test.ts (16), jira-client.test.ts (10), github-client.test.ts (11), slack-client.test.ts (8), entrypoint.test.ts (8), container-boot.test.ts (4)

tests_passing.description: 190 tests pass + 4 skipped (integration). 0 failures. TypeScript build clean.

committed.description: 6 commits: Wave 1 (build/retry/errors), Wave 2+3 (callLLM + API wrappers), Wave 3 tests, Wave 4 (Dockerfile + entrypoint), Wave 4 tests, Wave 5 (container boot)

documented.description: Phase 4 completion doc written at docs/YYYY-MM-DD-phase4-execution-infra.md

phases.resume_hint: Phase 4 is complete. Proceed to Phase 5 (Execution Agent).

phases.name: Execution Agent
phases.description: OpenCode session receives task context, generates plan, writes code, validation pipeline runs with fix loop.

orchestrate_script.description: src/workers/orchestrate.mts — 12-step main() wiring all 7 modules, compiles to dist/workers/orchestrate.mjs

validation_pipeline.description: 5-stage runner (TypeScript→Lint→Unit→Integration→E2E) with PostgREST recording, fromStage re-entry

fix_loop.description: Per-stage(3) and global(10) limits, re-entry at failing stage forward, fix_iterations persisted to DB

escalation.description: Slack webhook POST + task PATCH to AwaitingInput + task_status_log entry (actor: machine)

execution_tracking.description: PATCH existing executions row (from /tmp/.execution-id), link agent_version_id, update current_stage

heartbeat.description: 60s setInterval PATCH to executions with heartbeat_at and current_stage, fire-and-forget

tests_written.description: 160 new tests across 10 test files (postgrest-client:19, task-context:19, opencode-server:14, session-manager:25, validation-pipeline:23, fix-loop:13, heartbeat:17, orchestrate:11, integration:6+1)

committed.description: 5 commits: deps, PostgREST+task-context, Wave2 modules, fix-loop+heartbeat, orchestrate+tests

phases.resume_hint: Phase 5 is complete. Proceed to Phase 6 (Completion & Delivery).

phases.name: Completion & Delivery
phases.description: Worker creates task branch + PR (with deduplication), writes completion to Supabase before Inngest event (SPOF mitigation), lifecycle function finalizes task with deliverables record.

branch_creation.description: src/workers/lib/branch-manager.ts — buildBranchName (ai/<id>-<kebab>), ensureBranch (ls-remote check + checkout/create), commitAndPush (--force-with-lease, empty diff detection)

pr_creation.description: src/workers/lib/pr-manager.ts — checkExistingPR (listPRs with owner:branch filter), createOrUpdatePR (dedup check before createPR), buildPRBody. Title format: [AI] <ticket-id>: <summary>

supabase_first_write.description: src/workers/lib/completion.ts — writeCompletionToSupabase PATCHes tasks to Submitting + POSTs deliverables + task_status_log. runCompletionFlow enforces Supabase-first ordering (invocationCallOrder tested).

inngest_completion_event.description: sendCompletionEvent sends HTTP POST to Inngest with deterministic ID task-${taskId}-completion-${executionId}. 3 retries with exponential backoff. Returns false on failure (graceful).

lifecycle_finalize.description: lifecycle.ts finalize updated: creates deliverables record (pull_request/no_changes), transitions Submitting→Done with optimistic lock, writes task_status_log (actor: lifecycle_fn). Idempotent for Done/Cancelled.

tests_written.description: 104 new tests: branch-manager (24), pr-manager (19), completion (27), project-config (17), orchestrate updates (10+), lifecycle updates (7+)

tests_passing.description: 435 tests pass + 1 pre-existing container-boot infra failure + 10 skipped (OpenCode integration). 0 regressions from Phase 5 baseline of 331.

committed.description: 8 commits: branch-manager, pr-manager, completion module, project-config, orchestrate.mts integration, lifecycle.ts finalize, entrypoint.sh git identity, phase6 doc

documented.description: docs/2026-03-30-2038-phase6-completion-delivery.md — 424 lines covering all modules, flow diagrams, design decisions, test suite table

phases.resume_hint: Phase 6 is complete. Proceed to Phase 7 (Resilience & Monitoring).

phases.name: Resilience & Monitoring
phases.description: Watchdog cron, redispatch with 6h budget, cost circuit breaker with Slack alerting, waitForEvent pre-check, agent versioning, structured JSON logging (pino), real Fly.io machine dispatch, token tracking, tooling_config re-entry.

watchdog_cron.description: Inngest cron every 10min. Detects stale executions (no heartbeat 10min), destroys 4h+ machines, recovers Submitting tasks stuck > 15min. runWatchdog() exported as pure testable function.

redispatch_flow.description: 6-hour elapsed time check added to redispatch.ts. Attempt limit (3) and 6h budget enforced. repoUrl/repoBranch forwarded on re-dispatch.

cost_circuit_breaker.description: callLLM() now sends Slack alert on first threshold crossing (1h cooldown). Lifecycle adds check-cost-gate step before machine dispatch. Tasks held in AwaitingInput when over $50/day.

waitforevent_race_fix.description: pre-check-completion step added before step.waitForEvent. If task Submitting: skip waitForEvent, proceed to finalize with synthetic result. If Done/Cancelled: return early.

agent_versioning.description: agent-version.ts created with computeVersionHash() and ensureAgentVersion(). orchestrate.mts computes hash at execution start and writes agent_version_id to execution record via PostgREST upsert.

structured_logging.description: pino logger (src/lib/logger.ts) with createLogger/taskLogger. All console.log/warn/error in src/workers/ and src/inngest/ migrated to structured JSON logger. Sensitive field redaction enabled.

fly_dispatch.description: fly-client.ts created with createMachine/destroyMachine/getMachine. lifecycle.ts dispatch-fly-machine step replaced with real createMachine() call. Machine ID stored in execution.runtime_id. Missing FLY_API_TOKEN escalates gracefully.

token_tracking.description: token-tracker.ts created with addUsage()/getAccumulated(). orchestrate.mts accumulates tokens during execution, writes prompt_tokens/completion_tokens/estimated_cost_usd/primary_model_id to executions at completion and on failure.

tooling_config_reentry.description: fetchProjectConfig() moved from Step 12 (post-fix-loop) to Step 4 (pre-fix-loop) in orchestrate.mts. Real tooling_config now passed to runWithFixLoop(). Falls back to DEFAULT_TOOLING_CONFIG if null.

fly_machine_cleanup.description: lifecycle.ts finalize step now calls destroyMachine() on both success and timeout paths. Uses .catch(()=>{}) — non-fatal. Backup to machine self-destruct.

tests_written.description: ~200+ new tests: logger (11), fly-client (14), agent-version (10), token-tracker (10), redispatch (8), watchdog (7), plus tests in lifecycle, orchestrate, call-llm, and all worker lib files.

tests_passing.description: 307+ tests pass. 1 pre-existing infra failure (container-boot.test.ts). 10 skipped (integration). 0 new regressions.

committed.description: 15 commits: baseline, fly-client, agent-version, token-tracker, logger, redispatch, tooling-config, fly-dispatch, cost-circuit-breaker, agent-version-link, waitForEvent-precheck, fly-cleanup, logger-migration, spy-test-fixes, watchdog

phases.resume_hint: Phase 7 is complete. Proceed to Phase 8 (Full Local E2E).

phases.name: Full Local E2E
phases.description: Complete flow from Jira webhook to PR, running entirely locally. MVP validation milestone.

all_services_running.description: Local Supabase + Inngest Dev Server + Event Gateway + Docker Desktop all running simultaneously

webhook_to_pr_flow.description: Send realistic Jira webhook → task created → lifecycle triggers → container boots → code written → PR created → task Done

full_status_audit.description: task_status_log shows: NULL→Ready(gateway), Ready→Executing(lifecycle_fn), Executing→Submitting(machine), Submitting→Done(lifecycle_fn)

all_records_populated.description: tasks, executions, validation_runs, deliverables, task_status_log all have correct data

twelve_point_checklist.description: All 12 verification checks from the implementation phases doc pass
twelve_point_checklist.notes: See docs/2026-03-25-1901-mvp-implementation-phases.md Phase 8 section for the full 12-point checklist

documented.description: Phase architecture doc not yet created

phases.resume_hint: Phase 8 is complete. Proceed to Phase 9 (Cloud Deployment).

phases.name: Cloud Deployment
phases.description: Same flow on Fly.io + Supabase Cloud + Inngest Cloud. Infrastructure swap, not code change.

supabase_cloud.description: Supabase project created, migrations deployed, seed data inserted, connection verified

inngest_cloud.description: Inngest project created, signing key + event key configured

flyio_gateway.description: ai-employee-gateway app deployed with all secrets set, health check passing

flyio_worker_image.description: Worker image built and pushed to Fly.io registry

webhooks_configured.description: Jira and GitHub webhooks pointing to Fly.io gateway URL

cloud_e2e_passing.description: Same 12-point checklist as Phase 8 but against cloud URLs

watchdog_running.description: Watchdog cron executing on Inngest Cloud schedule

documented.description: Phase architecture doc not yet created

phases.resume_hint: Requires Phase 8 complete (local E2E passing). Follow the Deployment Runbook in §27. This should 'just work' — cloud is an infra swap, not a code change.

phases.name: Production Integration
phases.description: Real Jira tickets trigger the flow. Shadow mode first, then supervised mode. Feedback loop captures corrections.

real_jira_webhooks.description: Jira project webhook configured to fire on issue_created and issue_deleted

shadow_mode.description: 1-2 weeks: system creates draft PRs with [SHADOW] prefix. Human reviews all output, records feedback. No merges.

supervised_mode.description: Remove [SHADOW] prefix. PRs created normally. Human reviews and merges manually. Feedback captured on every review.

feedback_capture.description: feedback table populated on PR rejection (pr_rejection) and approval with changes (merge_override)

monitoring_ritual.description: Daily 5-min check (Inngest queue, execution logs, costs, Fly.io health). Weekly 15-min review (feedback, escalations, agent versions).

m3_gate_met.description: After 10+ tickets: compilable PRs for simple tickets, >= 60% human approval without changes
m3_gate_met.notes: This is the M3 milestone gate from §16 of the architecture doc

documented.description: Phase architecture doc not yet created

phases.resume_hint: Requires Phase 9 complete (cloud deployment working). Start with shadow mode — do NOT skip to supervised. Read §21 for the feedback loop design.
